name: PRISM
short_description: Master mystical spells and advanced movement techniques in PRISM, a first-person parkour speedrunning game where seconds count and style matters. Blast, slide, and swing your way through medieval landscapes to claim your place atop the leaderboards.
detailed_description:
RACE AGAINST TIME, MASTER THE ELEMENTS

In PRISM, speed is your ultimate weapon. Take on the role of an agile mage armed with three elemental spells, each unlocking unique movement possibilities as you dash through meticulously crafted medieval environments.

HARNESS THREE MAGICAL ABILITIES:

  • Fireball - Launch yourself skyward with explosive rocket jumps to reach new heights and shortcuts

  • Ice - Freeze surfaces ahead to create frictionless pathways for high-speed slides

  • Rope - Attach to any surface and swing through the air with precision and momentum

MASTER ADVANCED TECHNIQUES

True mastery of PRISM comes from combining your magical abilities with advanced movement mechanics:

  • Chain crouch slides into explosive jumps

  • Maintain momentum through perfectly timed rope swings

  • Discover hidden shortcuts and optimize your route through each level

  • Perfect the timing of spell combinations to shave crucial seconds off your run

COMPETE GLOBALLY

  • Challenge yourself against players worldwide on the global leaderboards

  • Track your personal best times and see your improvement

ARE YOU READY TO CLAIM YOUR PLACE AT THE TOP?

PRISM rewards both raw speed and technical mastery. Whether you're a casual player looking to improve your personal times or a competitive speedrunner aiming for world records, the journey to mastery is yours to undertake.

Blast. Slide. Swing. Conquer.
